fundamentals.name: Bloom Energy Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Bloom Energy Corporation designs, manufactures, sells, and installs solid oxide fuel cell systems for on-site power generation in the United States and internationally. It offers Bloom Energy Server, an energy server platform to convert fuel, such as natural gas, biogas, hydrogen, or a blend of these fuels, into electricity through a non-combustion electrochemical process. The company also provides Bloom Electrolyzer for producing hydrogen. It sells its products through direct and indirect sales channels to utilities, data centers, retail, healthcare, education, telecom, manufacturing, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Ion America Corp. and changed its name to Bloom Energy Corporation in 2006. Bloom Energy Corporation was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue driven by AI demand, but with high valuation multiples and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter EPS beat estimate by 242.4%; next earnings date is 2026-04-28.
positives: Revenue growth 130.4% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Analyst growth estimates for current Q (286.1%) and FY (179.5%) are very strong.
Last quarter EPS beat estimate by 242.4% (0.44 vs 0.13).
Strong liquidity with current ratio 5.03 and quick ratio 3.98.
Free cash flow positive at $265.52M TTM.
negatives: Forward P/E of 73.38x and Price/Sales of 35.76x are very high.
Profit margin is extremely thin at 0.2%.
Return on equity is low at 1.3%.
Analyst mean target of $245.13 is below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: Bloom Energy (BE) is experiencing a surge driven by its role in AI data center expansion, including a partnership with Nebius to accelerate AI power. This follows an upgraded 2026 outlook and a strong earnings beat in the last quarter, where EPS significantly surpassed estimates. However, one analyst suggests the stock's rally may have pushed it too far, indicating potential overvaluation concerns amidst the excitement.

headlines.title: Nvidia GPU Price Surge Sparks AI Stock Rally: Nebius, CoreWeave, IREN Jump
Bloom Energy’s Rally May Have Pushed the Stock Too Far
Nebius Partners With Bloom to Accelerate AI Power Expansion
Bloom Energy (BE) Valuation In Focus After AI Data Center Deals And Upgraded 2026 Outlook
